rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) bears no relation to Educ. Code §31.030, which governs used instructional materials sold to school districts.
quote: The State Board of Education shall adopt rules to ensure that used instructional materials sold to school districts and open-enrollment charter schools are not sample copies that contain factual errors.
_note: No conflict; rule_text addresses an unrelated subject area.
